main.description: Rich document body as CommonMark/GFM-flavored markdown. A member of site.standard.document's open `content` union (SLIMS-64): the document record's `textContent` field always carries a plaintext mirror alongside this, so a standard.site reader with no knowledge of this lexicon still renders the body.

markdown.description: The document body, as markdown source.

blobs.description: Blobs referenced by embedded content (e.g. images) in the markdown. Unused in v1 — reserved so a future version can pin embedded media without a schema migration.
